Package org.areslib.core

Class FieldConstants

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.core.FieldConstants
public final class FieldConstants extends Object
Centralized field boundary constants for the FTC competition environment.

PathPlanner operates in meters following WPILib coordinates (origin at bottom-right of blue alliance wall). Vision systems (Limelight) operate in meters with origin at field center. Both coordinate systems are defined here to ensure consistency across bounds-checking in FollowPathCommand and VisionSubsystem.

    Driver alliance selector for field-centric heading offset.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final double
    FIELD_SIZE_INCHES
    Field width/height in inches (12 feet = 144 inches).
    static final double
    HALF_FIELD_INCHES
    Half-field size in inches — used for center-origin ↔ bottom-left-origin conversion.
    static final double
    HALF_FIELD_METERS
    Half-field size in meters (field is 3.6576m per side).
    static final double
    INCHES_TO_METERS
    Conversion factor from inches to meters.
    static final double
    MAX_ELEVATION_METERS
    Maximum valid robot elevation before rejecting as ghost reflection.
    static final double
    MAX_POSITION_INCHES
    Maximum valid X/Y in WPILib/PathPlanner coordinates (with padding).
    static final double
    MAX_VISION_POSITION_METERS
    Maximum valid absolute X/Y in vision coordinates (with generous buffer).
    static final double
    METERS_TO_INCHES
    Conversion factor from meters to inches.
    static final double
    MIN_POSITION_INCHES
    Minimum valid X/Y in WPILib/PathPlanner coordinates (with padding).
    static final double
    ROBOT_SIZE_METERS
    Standard FTC robot frame size in meters (18 inches).
    static final double
    SIM_ANGULAR_DAMPING
    Synthetic angular damping applied to the robot body to model rotational floor friction.
    static final double
    SIM_LINEAR_DAMPING
    Synthetic linear damping applied to the robot body to model carpet friction.
    static final double
    SIM_WALL_FRICTION
    Wall collision friction coefficient for dyn4j inter-body contact.
    static final double
    SIM_WALL_RESTITUTION
    Wall collision restitution (bounce) coefficient for dyn4j.
    static final double
    WALL_PADDING_INCHES
    Tolerance padding in inches for robot overhang beyond field walls.

    • SIM_WALL_FRICTION

      public static final double SIM_WALL_FRICTION
      Wall collision friction coefficient for dyn4j inter-body contact. Dimensionless — see dyn4j friction documentation.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SIM_WALL_RESTITUTION

      public static final double SIM_WALL_RESTITUTION
      Wall collision restitution (bounce) coefficient for dyn4j. Dimensionless (0 = perfectly inelastic, 1 = perfectly elastic).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SIM_LINEAR_DAMPING

      public static final double SIM_LINEAR_DAMPING
      Synthetic linear damping applied to the robot body to model carpet friction.
